Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.RestRequest

Packages that use RestRequest
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.client
Next-generation REST client — transport-agnostic HTTP client built on Juneau's serialization stack.
org.apache.juneau.rest.mock
REST Server Mock API

  • Uses of RestRequest in org.apache.juneau.rest.client

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.client that return RestRequest
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.body(Object value)
    Sets the request body from an arbitrary Java object.
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.body(HttpBody value)
    Sets the request body directly from an HttpBody.
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.bodyString(String value)
    Sets the request body to a raw string (UTF-8, text/plain).
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.debug()
    Flags this request for verbose debug logging.
    RestRequest
    RestClient.delete(String url)
    Creates a DELETE request to the given URL.
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.formData(String name, String value)
    Adds a form field.
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.formData(HttpPart... value)
    Adds form fields (for application/x-www-form-urlencoded bodies).
    RestRequest
    RestClient.get(String url)
    Creates a GET request to the given URL.
    RestRequest
    RestLogEntry.getRequest()
    Returns the request that triggered this log entry.
    RestRequest
    RestClient.head(String url)
    Creates a HEAD request to the given URL.
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.header(String name, String value)
    Adds a request header.
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.header(String name, Supplier<String> value)
    Adds a request header with a lazy value.
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.headers(HttpHeader... value)
    Adds request headers.
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.interceptors(RestCallInterceptor... value)
    Adds per-request lifecycle interceptors.
    RestRequest
    RestClient.patch(String url)
    Creates a PATCH request to the given URL.
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.pathData(String name, Object value)
    Adds a path variable.
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.pathData(HttpPart... value)
    Adds path variable substitutions for URI templates (e.g. replaces {id} in the URL).
    RestRequest
    RestClient.post(String url)
    Creates a POST request to the given URL.
    RestRequest
    RestClient.put(String url)
    Creates a PUT request to the given URL.
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.queryData(String name, String value)
    Adds a query parameter.
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.queryData(String name, Supplier<String> value)
    Adds a query parameter with a lazy value.
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.queryData(HttpPart... value)
    Adds query parameters.
    RestRequest
    RestClient.request(String method, String url)
    Creates a request with the given HTTP method and URL.
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.streamBodyEntity(RecordStreamBody value)
    Sets the request body to a token/record-streaming cursor body.
    RestRequest
    RestRequest.timeout(Duration value)
    Sets a per-call response timeout for this request.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.client with parameters of type RestRequest
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    RestCallInterceptor.onClose(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    Called when the request is being closed (in the finally block of run()).
    default void
    RestCallInterceptor.onConnect(RestRequest req, RestResponse res)
    Called after a response has been received from the transport.
    default void
    RestCallInterceptor.onInit(RestRequest req)
    Called before the transport request is built and sent.
    RestLogEntry.Builder
    RestLogEntry.Builder.request(RestRequest value)
    Sets the request.
